profile.name: hiral panchal
profile.tagline: shipping production-grade full-stack applications — from system design to deployment.
profile.bio: i build and ship production-ready web applications end-to-end — from requirement analysis and system design through to cloud deployment. my core stack is javascript-based: react.js, node.js, next.js, and express.js, and i've used it to build multi-user saas platforms with real-time collaboration, jwt/rbac authentication, and automated ci/cd pipelines.

education.institution: mulund college of commerce, university of mumbai

experience.summary: drove b2b outbound client acquisition for a media production house.
highlights: managed the end-to-end sales cycle from prospecting and cold pitching to deal closure
contributed directly to project pipeline growth
developed client relationship skills and business communication in a fast-paced environment

experience.summary: launched and scaled a multi-channel affiliate marketing operation under the 'glorie' brand.
highlights: curated monetised content across health, tech, and lifestyle verticals
operated across whatsapp, telegram, pinterest, instagram, and linkedin

experience.summary: produced bilingual (hindi/english) multi-platform content campaigns for project bachpanshala.
highlights: delivered campaigns across linkedin, instagram, and twitter/x
adapted messaging, tone, and format for three distinct audience profiles

experience.summary: architected an award-winning four-agent ai cybersecurity platform.
highlights: performed ethical hacking, osint, and web vulnerability assessment
hands-on experience with ssh, vpn, exploit research, and security debugging tools
won best cyber security project award

experience.summary: maintained zero-error financial records across multiple client accounts in tally erp.
highlights: managed ledgers, gst entries, and bank reconciliation under strict compliance deadlines
zero-error record across multiple client accounts

projects.description: a production-grade multi-user saas platform with zero critical defects at release, supporting real-time collaboration across concurrent users. features websocket integration, jwt/rbac auth, live analytics dashboards, and automated transactional email flows.
